PackList.title: Ring Reveal
positive_prompts:
CRITICAL IDENTITY LOCK (MANDATORY): Extract faces from both input images and transplant exactly - preserve all features, bone structure, eyes, nose, mouth, jawline, cheeks with ZERO alterations.

FACE FIDELITY (BOTH SUBJECTS): Exact eye shape, eye color, eyebrows, nose, cheekbones, jawline, chin, and EXACT LIP SHAPE (thickness, width, curve, cupid's bow, contour, natural color) must perfectly match input photos. Preserve original hairstyles, hair color, hair texture, hair length exactly from input photos. Only clothing adapts to scene - FACES, LIPS, and HAIR are perfect copies from uploaded images. Lock all features with maximum fidelity.

INTIMATE COUPLE PORTRAIT: Close-up shot of woman (Input 1) and man (Input 2) with faces close together in tender moment. Woman's hand in foreground displaying engagement ring - tapered wide band with pavé-set diamonds and central square-cut solitaire.

FACIAL DETAILS - WOMAN: Ultra-detailed skin texture with faint pores and fine peach fuzz. Long individually defined wispy eyelashes with natural lift. High-arched groomed eyebrows. Soft neutral matte lip matching original lip shape exactly.

FACIAL DETAILS - MAN: Deep smile lines (nasolabial folds) and crow's feet wrinkles around eyes conveying genuine emotion. Dark thick eyebrows and visible short stubble across jawline and chin. Eyes narrowed in joyful squint showing fine skin folds on nose bridge.

LIGHTING & AESTHETIC: Soft diffused natural indoor lighting creating gentle glow on skin. Low-contrast shadows. Muted earthy color palette with warm undertones. Shallow depth of field (bokeh) making background creamy neutral blur.

9:16 vertical, high-resolution 8K, cinematic film grain, shot on 85mm lens, candid authentic emotion, tender vibe, photorealistic.

Man (Input 2) on right leaning into her, wearing sharp charcoal grey tailored suit with crisp white button-down shirt slightly open at collar.

FACIAL DETAILS - WOMAN: Large almond-shaped siren eyes with deep cocoa-brown irises matching original eye color, ultra-defined voluminous black silk eyelashes.
